issues: Code uses adapter output columns 'date', but also uses 'bullish_emoji_ratio', 'bearish_emoji_ratio', and 'mention_volume' which are NOT in the adapter contract returns ['date', 'posts', 'comments'].
Signal logic uses percentage change > 150% and >= 50% thresholds as per spec, mapping RISK_ON to BUY and RISK_OFF to SELL correctly.
Position sizing uses 2% allocation per position as per spec.
Indentation errors in code (e.g. missing indentation after if statements) but not counted as spec logic failure.
